Author: NalaPraline
Name: Zone
Punchline: The official ZONE event companion plugin.
Description:
Zone is the all-in-one companion for ZONE events.

Features:
- Live DJ lineup with schedule
- Activity tracker with teleport support
- Staff directory
- Zone Vision HUD overlay
- Midnight time lock for full atmosphere

Commands:
/zone - Open the Zone window
/zonevision - Toggle the Zone Vision overlay
Changelog:
1.2.23
- Show venue address on home banner during event
